pageHeader.title: asset template
pageHeader.description: maintain asset templates and their associated processing handlers.

info.title: What is an Asset Template?
info.description: An Asset Template defines the blueprint for creating assets, including data structure, processing rules, validation logic, and conversion scripts. Templates ensure consistency and enable automated data handling across similar device types.

reusability.title: Reusable Blueprint
reusability.text: Create one template and use it for multiple assets of the same type, ensuring consistency

processing.title: Data Processing
processing.text: Define processor, validator, and conversion scripts to handle incoming data automatically

manufacturer.title: Device Specification
manufacturer.text: Associate templates with manufacturer, model, and version for precise device identification

systemTemplates.title: System Templates
systemTemplates.text: Pre-built templates provided by MapexOS for common device types and protocols

customization.title: Custom Templates
customization.text: Create custom templates tailored to your specific device requirements and data formats

empty.title: no assets template found
empty.description: it seems there are no assets template matching your current search criteria or you don't have any asset template yet.

confirmDelete.title: confirm deletion
confirmDelete.message: are you sure you want to delete the asset template "{name}"?

notifications.sharedTemplateEdit: shared templates from other organizations cannot be edited
notifications.sharedTemplateDelete: shared templates from other organizations cannot be deleted

drawer.title: template details
drawer.systemTemplateWarning: this is a system template and cannot be modified or deleted

pageHeader.title: asset template
pageHeader.description: create a new asset template with data processing scripts

stepper.title: configure asset template
stepper.subtitle: complete all steps to create a new template

basicInfo.title: basic information
basicInfo.description: add template name, manufacturer, and device details

assetIdPath.title: asset id path
assetIdPath.description: define the path to identify your assets

banner.title: what is asset id path?
banner.description: the asset id path is a dot-notation path that points to the unique identifier in your incoming payload. this identifier is used to uniquely identify and track your assets.

assetIdPath.label: asset id path
assetIdPath.dotRequired: must contain at least one dot (.)

step3.title: preprocessor script (optional)
step3.description: prepare and normalize incoming data before validation. this step is optional but useful for data transformation.

step4.title: validation script (required)
step4.description: validate data integrity and format using the $mv validator.

step5.title: conversion script (required)
step5.description: convert validated data to MapexOS standardizedpayload format. this ensures consistency across the platform.

banner.title: standardizedpayload format (required)
banner.description: your conversion script must return an object with the following structure:
banner.eventId: required - unique identifier for this event

guidelines.title: script guidelines
guidelines.return: expected return: standardizedpayload object with all required fields

step6.title: test payload
step6.description: define a test payload that will be used to validate your scripts in the next step.

banner.description: this payload will be used to test all your scripts (preprocessor, validation, conversion, and test script).
your conversion script must return a standardizedpayload.

step7.title: execute script tests
step7.modifyHint: to modify the test payload, go back to step 6
step7.noResults: click 'run test' to test your scripts

output.label: final output (standardizedpayload):
output.invalidBanner: the output does not match the standardizedpayload format. required fields: eventtype, eventid, data, created

step8.title: review configuration
step8.description: review all configuration before saving your asset template.
